# CI Scope Plan

This planning document describes future CI scope concepts without creating executable workflows.

## Future Scope Concepts

- Build check planning
- Lint check planning
- TypeScript check planning
- Scoped communication safety scan planning
- Documentation consistency check planning
- Governance validation planning

## Boundaries

Future CI must not deploy, provision providers, send communication, handle credentials, mutate databases, or approve changes automatically.

## Current Status

No `.github/workflows` directory is created by this planning step.
